name: terminal-mcp
description: A VS Code extension that registers terminal tools directly with the language model tools API.

terminal-mcp.multilineWorkaround.description: Use the sendText workaround for multiline commands to avoid PTY corruption. When disabled, multiline commands use executeCommand like single-line commands.

commands.title: Terminal MCP: Show Shell Integration Status

languageModelTools.name: runInTerminal
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Execute a shell command in a VS Code terminal. Background executions return a terminal ID. Foreground executions wait for completion when shell integration is available.

command.description: The command to run in the terminal.

explanation.description: A one-sentence description of what the command does. This is shown before execution.

goal.description: A short description of the purpose of the command.

isBackground.description: Whether the command should continue running in the background.

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for foreground execution. Use 0 for no timeout.

languageModelTools.name: awaitTerminal
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Wait for a background terminal command to complete. Returns the output, exit code, or timeout status.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Wait for a background terminal command to complete.

id.description: The ID of the terminal to await.

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds. Use 0 for no timeout.

languageModelTools.name: getTerminalOutput
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get the output of a terminal command previously started with runInTerminal.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get output from a tracked terminal command.

id.description: The ID of the terminal to check.

languageModelTools.name: killTerminal
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Kill a tracked terminal by its ID and return the output captured so far.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Kill a tracked terminal by ID.

id.description: The ID of the tracked terminal to kill.
